categories.title: Data Display
categories.description: List, grid, filter, sort and import/export capabilities.

categories.title: Forms
categories.description: Form capabilities available to CRUD flows.

categories.title: UI & Experience
categories.description: Theming, language, layout and navigation behaviors.

features.title: Multi view modes
features.description: Table and grid view toggle for the same dataset.

subFeatures.title: Table view
subFeatures.description: Tabular rendering with pagination and sort.

subFeatures.title: Grid view
subFeatures.description: Card-style grid rendering for the same dataset.

subFeatures.title: View toggle
subFeatures.description: Switch between table and grid without reloading data.

features.title: Sort
features.description: Column / field sorting on the list.

subFeatures.title: Single column sort
subFeatures.description: Click a header to cycle asc → desc → none.

subFeatures.title: Server-driven sort
subFeatures.description: Emit sort_by/sort_order query params and rely on the server.

features.title: Filter new UI
features.description: Redesigned filter panel with chips and facets.

subFeatures.title: Filter panel
subFeatures.description: Drawer/popover with grouped facets and inputs.

subFeatures.title: Quick filters
subFeatures.description: Common filters exposed as one-click buttons.

features.title: Filter chips on UI
features.description: Active filters shown as removable chips above the list.

subFeatures.title: Active filter chips
subFeatures.description: Applied filters shown as removable chips above the list.

features.title: Expandable tiles UI
features.description: Overflowed columns shown in an expandable detail panel per row.

subFeatures.title: Inline detail panel
subFeatures.description: Expanding a row shows overflowed columns as tiles.

features.title: JSON format Props in list
features.description: List is driven by a JSON config — no per-page coding.

subFeatures.title: Config-driven list
subFeatures.description: Entire list wired via a JSON schema — no bespoke code.

features.title: Deep linking feature in list
features.description: URL carries filter/sort/pagination so links reproduce list state.

subFeatures.title: Query-string state
subFeatures.description: Filter/sort/page reflected in URL for shareable links.

features.title: Import
features.description: Bulk import records from CSV/Excel.

subFeatures.title: CSV / Excel import
subFeatures.description: Bulk create records from a spreadsheet upload.

features.title: Export
features.description: Export filtered list to CSV/Excel.

subFeatures.title: CSV / Excel export
subFeatures.description: Download the current filtered list.

features.title: Multistep form
features.description: Wizard-style stepped forms with validation per step.

subFeatures.title: Stepper UI
subFeatures.description: Wizard layout with progress indicator.

subFeatures.title: Per-step validation
subFeatures.description: Each step validates before advancing.

features.title: 2 columns support in form
features.description: Two-column field layout inside a single step.

subFeatures.title: Two-column layout
subFeatures.description: Side-by-side field rendering inside a step.

features.title: File update field
features.description: Replace / update an existing file attachment in edit mode.

subFeatures.title: Replace attachment
subFeatures.description: Edit mode allows swapping the existing file.

features.title: Signature loading UI
features.description: Branded loading overlay / spinner used across the app.

subFeatures.title: Branded overlay
subFeatures.description: Full-screen loading overlay with brand motif.

features.title: User detail modals
features.description: Rich user detail modal with inline actions.

subFeatures.title: Detail modal
subFeatures.description: Rich modal summarizing a user with inline actions.

features.title: Semester design component
features.description: Dedicated semester planner / design widget.

subFeatures.title: Planner widget
subFeatures.description: Dedicated semester planner component.

features.title: Multi language support (LTR/RTL)
features.description: Runtime language switch with RTL layout support.

subFeatures.title: Runtime language switch
subFeatures.description: Translate and re-layout on the fly.

subFeatures.title: RTL layout support
subFeatures.description: Mirror layout and alignment for Arabic/Urdu.

features.title: Theme implementation from single file
features.description: Single source-of-truth theme file drives the whole app.

subFeatures.title: Central theme file
subFeatures.description: Single source-of-truth file drives palette and tokens.

features.title: Auto scroll sidebar + one tab open at a time
features.description: Sidebar auto-scrolls to active item; only one accordion open at a time.

subFeatures.title: Auto-scroll
subFeatures.description: Sidebar scrolls the active item into view.

subFeatures.title: Single-open accordion
subFeatures.description: Only one sidebar group is expanded at a time.

features.title: Encryption with accessToken + platform
features.description: Double-layer AES encryption using access token + platform key.

subFeatures.title: Double-layer AES
subFeatures.description: Payload encrypted with token + platform key.

features.title: Custom
features.description: Project-specific customizations built on top of the platform.

subFeatures.title: Project-specific screens
subFeatures.description: Anything unique to this project sits here.

customNotes.ilmverseAi: Dashboard, merged other projects into it
